query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS linkClicks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vaultId INT NOT NULL,
  linkId INT NOT NULL,
  linkTitle VARCHAR(255),
  clickedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  userAgent TEXT,
  INDEX idx_vault_link (vaultId, linkId),
  INDEX idx_clicked_at (clickedAt)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AWx11XxytSJCwL.root --database MTnGojgUB5HzdQARgKvcKo --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS linkClicks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vaultId INT NOT NULL,
  linkId INT NOT NULL,
  linkTitle VARCHAR(255),
  clickedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  userAgent TEXT,
  INDEX idx_vault_link (vaultId, linkId),
  INDEX idx_clicked_at (clickedAt)
);
